input.content: Return exactly one JSON object with keys command, template, path, port, no_browser, watch, wait, tag, and output_path; set unused fields to null. Valid forms: new(template,path), dev(port,no_browser), up(port,watch,wait), build(tag), dockerfile(output_path).
